safety_courses.title: MAXX General Safety & Site Orientation
safety_courses.description: Mandatory site orientation covering hazard identification, emergency response, and site rules.

safety_courses.title: Hazard Communication (HAZCOM) & WHMIS
safety_courses.description: Understanding SDS sheets, chemical handling, and container labeling standard operating procedures.

safety_courses.title: Lock-out / Tag-out (Hazardous Energy Control)
safety_courses.description: Procedures for zero energy state verification and isolation of electrical, hydraulic, and pneumatic equipment.

safety_courses.title: DOT Operator Qualification & Defensive Driving
safety_courses.description: Compliance training for 49 CFR regulations, safe vehicle operation, and cargo transport standards.

safety_courses.title: Fall Protection & Elevated Work Safety
safety_courses.description: Proper use of full body harnesses, lanyards, anchor points, and fall arrest systems.

required_certificates.title: Commercial General Liability ($5M)
required_certificates.description: No less than $5,000,000 CGL limit naming MAXX Industries Ltd as additional insured.

required_certificates.title: Workers Compensation Certificate
required_certificates.description: Statutory coverage with Waiver of Subrogation in favor of MAXX Industries Ltd.

required_certificates.title: Cargo Transport Insurance ($1M)
required_certificates.description: Required for vendors providing Cargo Transport Services.

required_certificates.title: First Aid / CPR Certification
required_certificates.description: Approved First Aid and CPR Provider Certificate.

required_certificates.title: Defensive Driving / DOT Card
required_certificates.description: Driver safety and DOT operator qualification card.

required_certificates.title: H2S Alive / Fit Test Certificate
required_certificates.description: Respiratory fit test and H2S awareness qualification.
